web.description: DeepSeek SVG Logos - A free AI / LLM model icon set covering major brands and models. Download SVG, PNG, and vectors.
web.markdown:
[All Icons](https://lobehub.com/icons) DeepSeek

# DeepSeek Model Logos

## Download official DeepSeek icon, supporting React / SVG / PNG / WebP   [Official Site: https://deepseek.com](https://deepseek.com/)

Download Icon

[GithubContribute on GitHub](https://github.com/lobehub/lobe-icons)

![DeepSeek Logo](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/lobehub/lobe-icons/refs/heads/master/packages/static-png/light/deepseek-color.png)

## DeepSeek Logos Icon Preview

Various modes and formats for icon download are provided below. If you need CDN service, please refer to the following documentation: [CDN Usage](https://github.com/lobehub/lobe-icons#-cdn-usage)

![DeepSeek Mono Logo (LightMod)](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/lobehub/lobe-icons/refs/heads/master/packages/static-png/light/deepseek.png)

Download Icon

## DeepSeek Logos React Components

I'm an Agent

I'm a Human

Send this prompt to your agent to use @lobehub/icons

```
Read https://lobehub.com/icons/skill.md and follow the instructions to use @lobehub/icons
```

Use the React icon package for more variant support, please refer to the following documentation: [@lobehub/icons](https://icons.lobehub.com/components/deep-seek)

DeepSeek

![DeepSeekMono.tsx](https://registry.npmmirror.com/@lobehub/assets-fileicon/1.0.0/files/assets/react_ts.svg)

DeepSeekMono.tsx

```
import { DeepSeek } from '@lobehub/icons';

export default () => <DeepSeek size={56} />;
```

DeepSeek

![DeepSeekColor.tsx](https://registry.npmmirror.com/@lobehub/assets-fileicon/1.0.0/files/assets/react_ts.svg)

DeepSeekColor.tsx

```
import { DeepSeek } from '@lobehub/icons';

export default () => <DeepSeek.Color size={56} />;
```

DeepSeek

![DeepSeekText.tsx](https://registry.npmmirror.com/@lobehub/assets-fileicon/1.0.0/files/assets/react_ts.svg)

DeepSeekText.tsx

```
import { DeepSeek } from '@lobehub/icons';

export default () => <DeepSeek.Text size={56} />;
```

DeepSeekDeepSeek

![DeepSeekCombine.tsx](https://registry.npmmirror.com/@lobehub/assets-fileicon/1.0.0/files/assets/react_ts.svg)

DeepSeekCombine.tsx

```
import { DeepSeek } from '@lobehub/icons';

export default () => <DeepSeek.Combine size={56} />;
```

DeepSeekDeepSeek

![DeepSeekCombineColor.tsx](https://registry.npmmirror.com/@lobehub/assets-fileicon/1.0.0/files/assets/react_ts.svg)

DeepSeekCombineColor.tsx

```
import { DeepSeek } from '@lobehub/icons';

export default () => <DeepSeek.Combine size={56} type={'color'}/>;
```

DeepSeek

![DeepSeekAvatar.tsx](https://registry.npmmirror.com/@lobehub/assets-fileicon/1.0.0/files/assets/react_ts.svg)

DeepSeekAvatar.tsx

```
import { DeepSeek } from '@lobehub/icons';

export default () => <DeepSeek.Avatar size={56} />;
```

web.markdown:
![deepseek color icon and logo in SVG format](https://cdn.jsdelivr.net/npm/@lobehub/icons-static-svg@latest/icons/deepseek-color.svg)

# deepseek color

Updated on:31 December 1969

By:

L [LobeHub Icons](https://github.com/lobehub/lobe-icons)

### Categories

[Ai](https://dashboardicons.com/icons?category=ai) [Model](https://dashboardicons.com/icons?category=model)

### Aliases

deepseek-textdeepseekdeepseek-coderdeepseek-v2deepseek-v3

### About this icon

Available in 3 formats (SVG, PNG, WEBP) with a base format of SVG. Includes both light and dark theme variants for better integration with different UI designs.

Perfect for adding to dashboards, app directories, documentation, or anywhere you need the deepseek color logo.

External icon provided by LobeHub.

Icons by LobeHub (MIT)

License: MIT

## Icon variants

Click on any icon to copy its URL to your clipboard

### Base Icon

Original icon version

![deepseek-color in svg format](https://cdn.jsdelivr.net/npm/@lobehub/icons-static-svg@latest/icons/deepseek-color.svg)

SVG

![deepseek-color in png format](https://cdn.jsdelivr.net/npm/@lobehub/icons-static-png@latest/light/deepseek-color.png)

PNG

![deepseek-color in webp format](https://cdn.jsdelivr.net/npm/@lobehub/icons-static-webp@latest/light/deepseek-color.webp)

WEBP

### Light theme

Icon variants optimized for light backgrounds (typically darker icon colors)

![deepseek-color-light in png format (light theme)](https://cdn.jsdelivr.net/npm/@lobehub/icons-static-png@latest/light/deepseek-color.png)

PNG

![deepseek-color-light in webp format (light theme)](https://cdn.jsdelivr.net/npm/@lobehub/icons-static-webp@latest/light/deepseek-color.webp)

WEBP

### Dark theme

Icon variants optimized for dark backgrounds (typically lighter icon colors)

![deepseek-color-dark in png format (dark theme)](https://cdn.jsdelivr.net/npm/@lobehub/icons-static-png@latest/dark/deepseek-color.png)

PNG

![deepseek-color-dark in webp format (dark theme)](https://cdn.jsdelivr.net/npm/@lobehub/icons-static-webp@latest/dark/deepseek-color.webp)

WEBP

Technical details

### Base format

SVG

### Available formats

SVG

PNG

WEBP

### Color variants

light:`deepseek-color-light`

dark:`deepseek-color-dark`

web.title: Lobe Icons - LobeHub
web.description: Icons are designed to be lightweight, utilizing highly optimized scalable vector graphics (SVG) for the best performance and quality.
web.markdown:
# LobeHub **Icons**

Popular AI / LLM Model Brand SVG Logo and Icon Collection

[GitHub](https://github.com/lobehub/lobe-icons) [View all icons](https://icons.lobehub.com/components/lobe-hub)

I'm an Agent

I'm a Human

Send this prompt to your agent to use @lobehub/icons

```
Read https://lobehub.com/icons/skill.md and follow the instructions to use @lobehub/icons
```

Color

Mono

### Lightweight & Scalable

Icons are designed to be lightweight, utilizing highly optimized scalable vector graphics (SVG) for the best performance and quality.

### Tree Shakable

The collection is tree-shakable, ensuring that you only import the icons that you use, which helps in reducing the overall bundle size of your project.

### Active Community

Lobe Icons boasts an active community of designers and developers. Engage with us on platforms like GitHub and Discord to contribute or get support.
